title: Haunted Hills
description: A Halloween-themed transformation for your Minecraft world.
body:
![Main banner for Haunted Hills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f9511e107b66767ada4ec080fc9a51b98838b1.png)

When the sun goes down, and the witching hour draws near, step into a macabre world of tricks and treats!

Haunted Hills is a Halloween-themed resource pack for Minecraft. It draws a lot of inspiration from the Spooky Mash-up pack from Minecraft Bedrock and Console editions, but aims to be its own unique resource pack full of original hand-crafted pixel art! Although a lot of the groundwork for the pack's visual style has been completed, it is still very much a work in progress. 

While this pack will work in vanilla, it relies quite a bit on modded resource pack features such as Connected Textures (CTM), custom colors, and custom entity models. A list of recommended mods can be found below: 

Recommended Mods:
- Polytone
- Entity Texture Features (ETF)
- Entity Model Features (EMF)
- Continuity (CTM)
